context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the ash-framework instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use `use Ash.Resource` for domain resources** — never manually implement protocols

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Define actions explicitly** — don't rely on `defaults [:read, :create]` without understanding what they expose

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Add policies for authorization** — every resource with sensitive data must have explicit policy blocks

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use `Ash.Changeset.for_create/3` and `Ash.Changeset.for_update/3`** — not bare struct manipulation

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Run `mix ash_postgres.generate_migrations` before manual migration** — let Ash generate the schema

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Verify resource loads** — run `mix compile` and confirm no `Spark.Error.DslError` before proceeding

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Define Domain module** — create a domain with `use Ash.Domain` and `resources do ... end`

checklist.name: instruction-8
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Define Resource** — use `use Ash.Resource, domain: MyApp.Domain, data_layer: AshPostgres.DataLayer`

checklist.name: instruction-9
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Define attributes** — use `uuid_primary_key`, `attribute`, `timestamps()` in the `attributes do` block

checklist.name: instruction-10
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Define relationships** — use `belongs_to`, `has_many`, `many_to_many` in `relationships do` block
